authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §5.85(a)(1) — Trout, General Statewide Regulations (inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (El Dorado Forebay not listed)
CCR T14 §7.50 — Alphabetical List of Trout Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (El Dorado Forebay not listed)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated 06/01/2026)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and 10 trout possession limit.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R2 El Dorado El Dorado Forebay Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-April & October-December

sources.title: Forebay Reservoir | El Dorado Irrigation District
sources.quotedText: Please note: No domestic animals are allowed in the water at Forebay Reservoir, and there is no swimming or wading. Forebay is open to the public from dawn until dusk. There are restrooms and picnic tables.

parameters.note: El Dorado Forebay is not listed in CCR §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), so it falls under the general statewide lake regulation in §5.85(a)(1).

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (general statewide lake regulation; not listed as a special-regulation water)
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.counting_rule: General statewide trout limit for inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds: five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag limit, 10 trout possession limit
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.description: El Dorado Forebay (Forebay Reservoir) is an El Dorado Irrigation District day-use recreation area open to the public from dawn until dusk; it is a no-body-contact reservoir — no swimming or wading, and no domestic animals in the water.

regulations.humanSummary: Day-use area open dawn until dusk; no swimming or wading (no-body-contact reservoir)
regulations.verbatimText: Please note: No domestic animals are allowed in the water at Forebay Reservoir, and there is no swimming or wading. Forebay is open to the public from dawn until dusk.

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists El Dorado Forebay (Region 2, El Dorado Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of January-April & October-December (this entry covers the January-April window). This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists El Dorado Forebay (Region 2, El Dorado Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of January-April & October-December (this entry covers the October-December window). This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
